legal.langNote: Legal documents are provided in English.
legal.tos11P1: Pattaya Nice City ("the Platform", "we", "us") is a community-driven information and discussion platform about restaurants, attractions, activities, and related services in the Pattaya area (Thailand). The Platform aggregates publicly available venue information and hosts user-generated discussions and reviews.
legal.tos11P2: The presence of any venue or business on this platform does not constitute an endorsement, sponsorship, partnership, or verification of any claims made by users. Listings are provided for informational purposes only and should not be interpreted as a recommendation, guarantee, or validation of the quality, legality, safety, or availability of any venue, service, or experience.
legal.tos11P3: The Platform does not organise, broker, arrange, facilitate, or intermediate any transaction, booking, or interaction between users and third-party venues or individuals.
legal.tos12P1: By accessing or using the Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must discontinue use immediately. The Platform is intended for users aged 13 and over. By using the Platform, you confirm that you meet this age requirement.
legal.tos12P2: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
legal.tos13P1: Certain features may require you to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to provide accurate information and to notify us promptly of any unauthorised use.
legal.tos13P2: We may suspend or terminate accounts at our discretion, particularly in cases of suspected violation of these Terms or applicable law.
legal.tos14P1: You agree to use the Platform lawfully and in accordance with these Terms. You must not use the Platform in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair it, or interfere with any other party's use. You are solely responsible for the content you publish and for ensuring it complies with applicable laws and these Terms.
legal.tos15P1: The following types of content are strictly prohibited on the Platform:
legal.tos15Item1: Content that violates any applicable local, national, or international law
legal.tos15Item2: Defamatory statements, libel, or knowingly false accusations against individuals or businesses
legal.tos15Item3: Harassment, bullying, intimidation, or targeted abuse of any person
legal.tos15Item4: Doxxing: publishing private or personally identifiable information about others without their consent (real names, addresses, phone numbers, workplaces, photographs used to identify private individuals)
legal.tos15Item5: Threats of violence, harm, or any form of intimidation
legal.tos15Item6: Impersonation of any person, business, or entity
legal.tos15Item7: Sexually explicit content depicting or appearing to depict minors, in any form
legal.tos15Item8: Solicitation, promotion, or facilitation of illegal services, including but not limited to trafficking, exploitation, or any form of coercion
legal.tos15Item9: Content that promotes, glorifies, or facilitates human trafficking or exploitation of any kind
legal.tos15Item10: Copyright-infringing material (text, images, videos, or other media) posted without authorisation from the rights holder
legal.tos15Item11: Spam, unsolicited advertising, or commercial solicitation not authorised by the Platform
legal.tos15Item12: Distribution of malware, phishing links, or any content designed to compromise user security
legal.tos15Item13: Fraud, scams, or deceptive practices of any kind
legal.tos15Item14: Presenting unverified rumours, speculation, or personal opinions as verified facts about identifiable individuals
legal.tos15Item15: Revenge content, intimate imagery shared without consent, or any content intended to shame, coerce, or blackmail
legal.tos16P1: The Platform may publish editorial content (venue descriptions, guides, curated information) alongside user-generated content (reviews, comments, forum posts). Editorial content is prepared by the Platform team and clearly distinguished where feasible. User-generated content reflects the views of its authors and does not represent the views or positions of the Platform.
legal.tos16P2: We do not systematically verify the accuracy, legality, or reliability of user-generated content. Users should exercise their own judgement when relying on any information found on the Platform.
legal.tos17P1: By submitting content to the Platform, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, sublicensable licence to use, display, reproduce, distribute, and adapt your content in connection with the operation of the Platform. You retain ownership of your content. This licence ends when you delete your content from the Platform, except where it has been shared by others or is retained for legal or safety purposes.
legal.tos18P1: We reserve the right, but are not obligated, to review, edit, limit, refuse, remove, or disable access to any content at our discretion, for any reason, including but not limited to violation of these Terms, legal requirements, or community safety considerations.
legal.tos18P2: We may restrict, suspend, or permanently terminate user accounts that repeatedly or seriously violate these Terms. Repeat offenders may be permanently banned without prior notice. We aim to apply moderation decisions consistently and proportionately.
legal.tos19P1: If you believe content on the Platform violates these Terms, applicable law, or your rights, you may submit a report via the contact channels listed in Section 6. We will review reports in a timely manner and take appropriate action where warranted.
legal.tos19P2: For copyright-related complaints, please refer to Section 5 (Copyright & Intellectual Property).
legal.tos110P1: The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available". We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, reliability, legality, or current availability of any information, venue listing, or user-generated content on the Platform.
legal.tos110P2: Information about venues (opening hours, prices, services, locations) may be outdated, incomplete, or inaccurate. Users are encouraged to verify details independently before making decisions based on Platform content.
legal.tos111P1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Platform and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from your use of or inability to use the Platform, including but not limited to damages arising from reliance on content, interactions with third parties, or loss of data.
legal.tos111P2: Where liability cannot be excluded by law, our total liability to you for any claim arising from or related to the Platform shall be limited to the amount you have paid to us, if any, in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
legal.tos112P1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the Platform, its operators, and affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the Platform, your content, or your violation of these Terms or applicable law.
legal.tos113P1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any dispute arising from these Terms or your use of the Platform shall be submitted to the competent courts of Thailand.
legal.tos114P1: We may terminate or suspend your access to the Platform at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform ceases immediately. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination (including, without limitation, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and indemnification) shall survive.
legal.guidelinesIntro: These guidelines exist to keep the Platform a useful, respectful, and safe space for everyone. They are a human-readable companion to the Terms of Service above.
legal.guidelinesWelcomeItem1: Honest reviews and first-hand experiences of venues and attractions
legal.guidelinesWelcomeItem2: Sharing practical tips, recommendations, and travel advice
legal.guidelinesWelcomeItem4: Asking questions and helping fellow community members
legal.guidelinesWelcomeItem5: Reporting outdated or incorrect venue information
legal.guidelinesWelcomeItem6: Sharing publicly available news or updates about the local scene
legal.guidelinesNA1Text: anything that violates Thai law or international law, including content related to trafficking, exploitation, or abuse
legal.guidelinesNA2Text: content soliciting, facilitating, or promoting illegal sexual services, exploitation of any kind, or content depicting minors in any sexual context
legal.guidelinesNA3Text: personal attacks, bullying, intimidation, threats of violence, stalking behaviour, or targeted campaigns against individuals
legal.guidelinesNA4Text: sharing personal data such as real names, addresses, phone numbers, photos, or workplace details of private individuals without consent
legal.guidelinesNA5Text: intimate or private imagery shared without the subject's consent, or content intended to shame, coerce, or blackmail
legal.guidelinesNA6Text: knowingly false statements about individuals or businesses, impersonation, or presenting speculation as established fact
legal.guidelinesNA7Text: unsolicited commercial messages, phishing, fraudulent schemes, or deceptive content
legal.guidelinesNA8Text: links to malware, phishing sites, or otherwise harmful resources
legal.guidelinesNA9Text: posting copyrighted material without permission from the rights holder
legal.guidelinesReportP1: If you encounter content that violates these guidelines, please report it using the reporting feature on the relevant content, or contact us directly at
legal.guidelinesReportP2: . Include a link to the content and a brief description of the issue.
legal.guidelinesAfterReportP1: We review all reports in a timely manner. Depending on the nature and severity of the violation, we may take one or more of the following actions:
legal.guidelinesAfterReportItem1: Removing or restricting access to the reported content
legal.guidelinesAfterReportItem2: Issuing a warning to the user responsible
legal.guidelinesAfterReportItem4: Permanently banning the user from the Platform
legal.guidelinesAfterReportItem5: Reporting the content to relevant authorities where required by law or in cases involving immediate safety risks
legal.guidelinesRepeatP1: Users who repeatedly violate these guidelines will face escalating consequences, up to and including permanent removal from the Platform. We maintain internal records of violations to ensure consistent and fair enforcement.
legal.moderationEditorialP1: The Platform publishes two types of content: editorial content created or curated by the Platform team (such as venue descriptions, guides, and curated listings) and user-generated content (such as reviews, comments, and forum posts). These are distinguished where feasible.
legal.moderationEditorialP2: The Platform does not verify every user claim, rating, or opinion. User-generated content represents the views of its authors, not the Platform.
legal.moderationApproachP1: We employ a risk-based approach to content moderation. Content that poses a higher risk to safety, legality, or the rights of others is prioritised for review. We may review content proactively, reactively (following user reports), or through a combination of both.
legal.moderationApproachP2: Moderation decisions are guided by the following criteria:
legal.moderationApproachItem1: Compliance with these Terms and Community Guidelines
legal.moderationApproachItem3: The safety and rights of individuals mentioned or affected
legal.moderationApproachItem4: The overall quality and integrity of the Platform
legal.moderationActionsP1: The Platform may, at its discretion and without prior notice:
legal.moderationActionsItem1: Review, edit, limit, or remove any user-generated content
legal.moderationActionsItem2: Restrict visibility of content pending review
legal.moderationActionsItem3: Preserve content where required for legal, safety, or evidentiary purposes
legal.moderationActionsItem4: Annotate or label content where appropriate (e.g., marking unverified claims)
legal.moderationTakedownP1: If you believe content on the Platform infringes your rights or violates applicable law, you may submit a takedown request to
legal.moderationTakedownItem1: Identification of the content at issue (URL or description)
legal.moderationTakedownItem2: The basis for your request (legal right infringed, specific term violated)
legal.moderationTakedownP3: We will review valid requests and respond within a reasonable timeframe.
legal.moderationCounterP1: If your content has been removed and you believe the removal was in error, you may submit a counter-notice explaining why the content should be restored. We will review counter-notices and may reinstate content where appropriate.
legal.moderationResponsibilityP1: Users remain solely responsible for the content they publish on the Platform. Publishing content does not transfer responsibility or liability to the Platform.
legal.moderationCooperationP1: The Platform will cooperate with lawful requests from competent authorities, including law enforcement, judicial, and regulatory bodies. We may disclose user data or content where required by law or where we believe in good faith that disclosure is necessary to protect the safety of any person or to prevent illegal activity.
legal.moderationUrgentP1: If you believe someone is in immediate danger, please contact local emergency services first. You may also report urgent safety concerns to
legal.moderationUrgentP2: . We will prioritise reports involving imminent risks to safety.
legal.privacyDataP1: We may collect the following categories of data:
legal.privacyDataItem1Text: email address, display name, profile picture, and authentication provider information (e.g., Google OAuth)
legal.privacyDataItem2Text: pages visited, features used, timestamps, referring URLs, browser type, device information, and IP address
legal.privacyDataItem3Text: reviews, comments, forum posts, and any other content you submit
legal.privacyDataItem4Text: records of reports, moderation actions, and related communications, retained for safety and legal compliance
legal.privacyCookiesP1: The Platform uses cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality (such as authentication and session management) and for analytics purposes (to understand how the Platform is used and to improve our services). Third-party analytics tools may set their own cookies. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
legal.privacyUseItem1: To provide, maintain, and improve the Platform
legal.privacyUseItem2: To manage user accounts and authentication
legal.privacyUseItem3: To enforce our Terms of Service and Community Guidelines
legal.privacyUseItem4: To respond to reports, inquiries, and legal requests
legal.privacyUseItem5: To detect and prevent abuse, fraud, and security incidents
legal.privacyUseItem6: To generate aggregated, anonymised usage statistics
legal.privacyRetentionP1: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide our services. Certain data may be retained for longer periods where required for legal compliance, dispute resolution, safety, or enforcement of our Terms. Moderation and trust and safety logs may be retained independently of account status.
legal.privacySharingP1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:
legal.privacySharingItem1Text: to operate and maintain the Platform
legal.privacySharingItem2Text: to protect against abuse and threats
legal.privacySharingItem3Text: where required by law or to respond to valid legal process
legal.privacySharingItem4Text: legal, accounting, or audit services, under appropriate confidentiality obligations
legal.privacyRightsP1: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights regarding your personal data, including the right to access, correct, delete, or port your data, or to object to certain processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at
legal.privacyRightsP2: . We will respond within a reasonable timeframe and in accordance with applicable law.
legal.privacyTransfersP1: Your data may be stored and processed in countries other than your country of residence. By using the Platform, you acknowledge that your data may be transferred internationally. We take reasonable steps to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy regardless of where it is processed.
legal.copyrightReportingP1: If you believe that content on the Platform infringes your copyright or trademark rights, please submit a complaint to
legal.copyrightReportingItem1: Identification of the copyrighted or trademarked work you believe has been infringed
legal.copyrightReportingItem2: Identification of the material on the Platform that you claim is infringing, including a URL or sufficient detail to locate it
legal.copyrightReportingItem3: Your contact information (name, email address, and, if applicable, mailing address and phone number)
legal.copyrightReportingItem4: A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the use of the material is not authorised by the rights holder, its agent, or the law
legal.copyrightReportingItem5: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information in your complaint is accurate and that you are the rights holder or authorised to act on their behalf
legal.copyrightAfterP1: Upon receiving a valid and complete complaint, we will review the claim and, where appropriate, remove or restrict access to the allegedly infringing material. We will notify the user who posted the content, where feasible, and provide them with the opportunity to submit a counter-notice.
legal.copyrightCounterP1: If you believe your content was removed in error or that you have authorisation to use the material, you may submit a counter-notice to
legal.copyrightCounterItem1: Identification of the material that was removed and its former location on the Platform
legal.copyrightCounterItem2: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that you have a good-faith belief the material was removed by mistake or misidentification
legal.copyrightCounterItem3: Your name, address, and contact information
legal.copyrightCounterItem4: A statement that you consent to the jurisdiction of the competent courts and will accept service of process from the complainant
legal.copyrightRepeatP1: In accordance with applicable copyright law, we maintain a policy of terminating the accounts of users who are repeat copyright infringers. Users who receive multiple valid copyright complaints may have their accounts suspended or permanently removed.
legal.copyrightPlatformP1: All original content, design, branding, logos, and software of the Platform are the intellectual property of Pattaya Nice City and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from Platform materials without prior written permission.
legal.contactIntro: For any questions, concerns, reports, or requests related to these legal documents or the Platform, please contact us using the email address below.
legal.contactAllRequests: This single address handles all inquiries, including legal matters, abuse reports, copyright complaints, privacy requests, and general questions. Please include as much detail as possible so we can assist you promptly.
legal.contactBusinessP1Unified: If you are a venue or business owner and wish to request a correction, update, or removal of information about your establishment, please email us at contact@pattayanicecity.com with details of your request. We will review legitimate requests and respond within a reasonable timeframe. Please include sufficient information to verify your identity and your connection to the business in question.

about.title: About Pattaya Nice City
about.subtitle: The community-driven guide to Pattaya
about.heroSubtitle: Your ultimate guide to the best places in Pattaya. Built by the community, for the community.
about.storyP1: We immigrated to Pattaya and quickly realized there was no complete guide, no real community, and nowhere to centralize all the info you need to enjoy this city. Every time we wanted to find a good restaurant, beach, or activity, we had to dig through scattered forums, outdated blogs, and unreliable tips.
about.storyP2: So we built Pattaya Nice City - one place to find everything: the best restaurants, beaches, temples, activities, real prices, honest reviews, and a community of people who actually live here.
about.storyP3: So we built Pattaya Nice City - one place to find everything: the best places to eat, relax, and explore. Whether you're here for a week or for life, you deserve to know where to go.
about.storyP4: We're just two good guys who want to build a real community - people sharing good vibes, good plans, helping each other out. No drama, no ego, just good energy, great discoveries, and smart moves. That's the spirit of Pattaya Nice City.
about.findBestSpotsDesc: Our #1 mission - help you find exactly what you're looking for
about.communityRatingsDesc: Every venue is rated by real visitors on what actually matters: vibe, food, prices, service, atmosphere. No fake reviews, no paid placements. Just raw, honest scores.
about.completeDirectoryDesc: Restaurants, cafes, beaches, temples, activities and more. Every category, every area of Pattaya. Filter by price, sort by rating, find your perfect day out.
about.liveRankingsDesc: See what's popular right now. Community votes push the best spots to the top. Prices, hours, everything you need to make the right call before you visit.
about.realReviewsDesc: Detailed write-ups from people who've actually been there. Not some travel blogger who visited once. Real regulars sharing real experiences.
about.joinCommunityDesc: Share experiences, help each other, build your reputation
about.communityP1: Pattaya Nice City is more than a directory - it's a living community. Share your discoveries, warn others about tourist traps, recommend hidden gems, ask questions. Every post, every comment, every upvote helps someone else have a better time.
about.communityP2: The more you contribute, the more karma you earn. Your reputation grows with your contributions. Quality reviewers become trusted voices that the whole community relies on.
about.reputationTiersDesc: Earn karma by posting, commenting, and getting upvotes. Your tier shows your credibility.
about.communitySpiritIntro: We're all here for the same thing: enjoy Pattaya and help each other discover the best this city has to offer. Keep the vibe positive, share your best finds, help newcomers feel at home.
about.rule1: Be honest: fake reviews hurt everyone. Share your real experiences.
about.rule2: Stay cool: no insults, no aggression, no drama. We're here to enjoy life.
about.rule3: Be respectful: to other members, to the venues, and to the people who work there.
about.rule4: Add value: a post that helps someone make a decision is worth way more than spam.
about.rule5: No personal attacks, no doxxing, no sharing private info.
about.rule6: The community moderates itself: upvote quality, downvote garbage.
about.moderationWarning: Moderators can and will ban users that are insulting, aggressive, or harmful to the community. Keep it chill.
about.contactUs: Have a question or need to reach us? Click here
